project.projectName: ADAS L2 Highway Assist Quality Assessment

qualityRequirements.text: The ADAS system shall detect hazardous inconsistency between fused object motion, lane information and vehicle motion state.
qualityRequirements.sqr: Acceptance criterion: hazardous inconsistency shall be flagged within one processing cycle when relative object motion conflicts with ego vehicle motion above the calibrated threshold.
qualityRequirements.result: FAILED Warning escalation timing exceeded threshold by 80 ms.
qualityRequirements.risk: Missing robust evidence for hazardous inconsistency detection may affect FuSA, SOTIF and AI Safety assessment readiness.

qualityRequirements.text: The ADAS system shall transition to safe state when a confirmed hazardous inconsistency persists beyond the confirmation time.
qualityRequirements.sqr: Acceptance criterion: safe state transition shall complete within the project defined fault reaction time after hazard confirmation.
qualityRequirements.test: TC_ADAS_FAILSAFE_001 Safe state transition timing test
qualityRequirements.result: PARTIAL Safe state output is correct, repeated confirmation under radar dropout is not yet completed.
qualityRequirements.risk: Safe state reaction evidence is incomplete before Gate Review.

qualityRequirements.text: The ADAS system shall update fused object result within 50 ms after receiving valid front camera and front radar input.
qualityRequirements.sqr: Acceptance criterion: p99 end to end latency from sensor input timestamp to fused object output shall be less than or equal to 50 ms.
qualityRequirements.result: PASSED p99 latency measured at 43 ms under maximum configured object count.
qualityRequirements.risk: No open timing risk for this requirement.

qualityRequirements.text: The ADAS system shall reject corrupted object list, invalid calibration checksum and unauthorized configuration changes.
qualityRequirements.sqr: Acceptance criterion: invalid calibration checksum and corrupted object input shall be rejected and diagnostic event shall be stored.
qualityRequirements.test: TC_ADAS_SEC_001 Calibration checksum and corrupted object input test
qualityRequirements.result: NOT EXECUTED Test environment pending diagnostic interface configuration.
qualityRequirements.risk: Missing cybersecurity integrity evidence may affect CS and FuSA argument.

qualityRequirements.text: The ADAS system shall provide first use guidance for AEB warning, LKA warning, degraded mode, unavailable state and takeover request.
qualityRequirements.sqr: Acceptance criterion: the HMI shall display approved first use messages before the driver starts assisted operation.
qualityRequirements.test: TC_ADAS_HMI_001 First use guidance message catalogue test
qualityRequirements.result: PASSED All displayed message IDs match the approved HMI message catalogue.
